Notes: Lisa Harfield goes over 1,000 points for her CU career.  Southwest wins 21st
Game.Officials: Will Fielding,  Tom Knoblach,  Scott Weinzierl

Descriptions.Efficiency:
Efficiency:

Descriptions.UsagePercentage:
Usage Percentage: The percentage of team plays used by a player. 
(FGA + (0.44 * FTA) + TO) / POSS
